# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] `feat` (new functionality)
- [ ] `fix` (bug fix)
- [ ] `perf` (performance improvement)
- [ ] `docs` (documentation only)
- [ ] `test` (tests only)
- [ ] `refactor` (no behavior change)
- [ ] `chore`/`ci`/`build` (maintenance)

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release expected
- [ ] Patch release expected
- [ ] Minor release expected
- [ ] Major release expected (breaking change)

## Conventional Commit Title

Provide the intended squash-merge title (Conventional Commits format):

`type(scope): short summary`

## Testing

List what you ran locally:

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `PYTHON=.venv/bin/python npm run test:parity` (if parity-sensitive)

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] No docs update needed

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change included and documented (`BREAKING CHANGE:` footer/details)

If this is breaking, describe migration impact:

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] New/updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Commit/merge message will follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Attribution/licensing implications considered when relevant
- [ ] Changes follow repository guidance in `AGENTS.md`
